summary: 15-minute conversational screen for an AI Engineer role at TechVision Vietnam. Focus on LLM application engineering, RAG, and production/MLOps maturity. Candidate: Nguyen Minh Tuan.

competencies.name: LLM application engineering
competencies.description: Building with LLM APIs: prompting, tool/function calling, structured output, evaluation.

competencies.name: RAG & retrieval
competencies.description: Chunking, embeddings, vector stores, retrieval quality and grounding.

competencies.name: Communication
competencies.description: Clarity of reasoning and ability to explain trade-offs.

interview_topics.title: LLM application design
questions: Walk me through an LLM-powered feature you built end to end. What did the request flow look like?
How did you handle prompts, tool calling, and structured outputs reliably?

interview_topics.title: RAG quality
questions: How do you decide chunking and embedding strategy for a knowledge base?
When retrieval returns irrelevant context, how do you diagnose and fix it?

interview_topics.title: Production & evaluation
questions: How do you evaluate an LLM system before and after shipping?
What did you do to control latency and cost in production?

inspector_criteria: Depth of hands-on LLM/RAG experience versus surface familiarity
Awareness of production trade-offs (latency, cost, monitoring)
